stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An ICAO flight plan provides the following information:

Item 18: EET/EINN0210

What does it mean?

options.a: Estimated elapsed time to EINN is 210 minutes.
options.b: Estimated elapsed time to destination EINN is 2 hours and 10 minutes.
options.c: EINN FIR boundary will be crossed after 2 hours and 10 minutes.
options.d: Speed change at EINN to 204 kt.
